children.name: about.txt
children.content: Cloud-native backend engineer focused on building scalable, reliable services with Python, FastAPI, Docker, Redis, AWS, and GCP. Experienced in designing REST APIs, caching strategies, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployment workflows.

children.name: hitachi.txt
children.content:
Graduate Engineer Trainee (Intern) | Hitachi Digital Services | Feb 2026 – Present
- Designed, built and deployed an Incident Reporting System on AWS (EC2, RDS, DynamoDB, Lambda, SNS, ALB) with S3-backed artifacts; focused on scalable backend workflows and event-driven processing.
- Containerized services with Docker, worked with containerized deployments on Kubernetes, and implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for automated build, test, and deploy.

children.name: vitals7.txt
children.content:
Software Development Intern | Vitals7, Inc. | May 2025 – Jan 2026
- Worked on the core healthcare platform, collaborating with domain experts to translate clinical workflows into scalable software features.
- Designed and implemented backend services using FastAPI, developing modular and maintainable REST APIs for application workflows.
- Integrated authentication and authorization using AWS Cognito and Amplify for secure user access management.
- Contributed to frontend integration using React Native and ReactJS components for mobile and web applications.

children.name: phntech.txt
children.content:
Web Development Intern | PHN Technology Pvt. Ltd. | Apr 2023 – Jun 2023
- Developed static web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, implementing modular components and dynamic DOM manipulation.
- Utilized Bootstrap to engineer responsive, cross-browser layouts, ensuring consistent rendering performance across diverse device viewports.

children.name: smartrevise.txt
children.content:
SmartRevise - Document Intelligence Engine | FastAPI, Pinecone, Redis, GCP | May 2026
- Built a scalable RAG-based document intelligence platform enabling semantic search, conversational query answering, and accurate citation tracking across multiple PDFs using FastAPI, Pinecone, Redis, and GCP.
- Designed a Redis-backed conversational memory layer for the RAG pipeline, reducing MongoDB session-history reads by up to ~99% and improving end-to-end LLM response latency by approximately ~9–14% across varying workload iterations.
- Implemented automated CI/CD pipelines for backend deployment using Google Cloud Build and Cloud Run, and deployed the frontend on Netlify for streamlined cloud-native delivery.

children.name: taskgpt.txt
children.content:
taskGPT - Python CLI Tool | Python, PyPI, Docker, APIs | Apr 2025
- Built and published a Python CLI tool on PyPI for running AI agents powered by OpenAI and Gemini models with modular command architecture.
- Implemented automated first-run setup workflows including dependency installation, API key configuration, and persistent environment-based settings across platforms.
- Containerized the application with Docker to support isolated, reproducible, and portable execution environments.

children.name: assessment_system.txt
children.content:
Intelligent Assessment and Evaluation System | Node.js, MongoDB, Gemini | Dec 2024
- Built a scalable assessment platform using the MERN Stack with real-time dashboards and performance analytics for tracking student progress and evaluation outcomes.
- Integrated Gemini API-based automated evaluation workflows to generate assessments, evaluate descriptive responses, and provide instant AI-driven feedback to students.
- Implemented secure online assessment features including full-screen monitoring, tab-switch detection, timed assessments, and automated test submission to improve examination integrity.

children.name: skills.txt
children.content:
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, SQL, C++
Backend & APIs: FastAPI, REST APIs, Node.js, Authentication (JWT/OAuth, Firebase Auth), API design, rate-limiting
Cloud & DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes (deployment, services), GitHub Actions (CI/CD), AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, SNS, DynamoDB), GCP (Cloud Run, Cloud Build)
Databases & Caching: MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, DynamoDB
AI/ML & GenAI: Pinecone, Vector DBs, RAG pipelines (indexing & retrieval)
Core CS: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, DBMS, Operating Systems

children.name: education.txt
children.content:
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Science (CGPA: 9.54) | Acharya Institute of Technology, Bengaluru | 2021 – 2025
Core Coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, Database Management Systems, Software Engineering, Operating Systems.

children.name: certifications.txt
children.content: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials – AWS Skill Builder
